Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Deft Garzarelli To Provide Responses To Discovery And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-24-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF ERNIE CALDERON's Motion To Compel Defendant Garzarelli To Provide Responses To Discovery And For Sanctions is OFF CALENDAR, untimely per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. Motion filed and served by mail on September 4, 2014. The earliest hearing date is October 1, 2014. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)
